observed_failure.surface: one-skill-at-a-time portfolio rollout before SourceGuard graduation
observed_failure.prior_claim_boundary: The executable model declared portfolio freshness and self-host traversed portfolio steps.
observed_failure.observed_result: No native portfolio registry, Guard impact propagation, proof-bound reuse ticket, or prior-child graduation gate existed behind those modeled steps.

generalized_repair.runtime: Add private registry validation, Guard impact invalidation, history-verifiable proof-bound reuse tickets, complete capability coverage, one-writer mutations, one-target graduation, and exact parent portfolio receipts.
generalized_repair.native_self_host: Replace three portfolio model assertions with executable audit, impact/reuse, and graduation commands, then run all four public commands through disposable CLI fixtures.
repair_extensions: Replace non-empty representative-job sufficiency with a current required-capability inventory and receipt-bound job/evidence coverage fingerprint.
Expand the Guard fingerprint from the internal package alone to scripts, schemas, Skill instructions, references, TestMesh, and compiled contract/check bindings.
Reject reuse tickets that cannot be revalidated against the registered Guard change and previous full receipt.
Serialize registry mutations, recover abandoned local locks, and write child ticket/receipt artifacts before registry references.
Make repository, installed-skill, scripts, and package runtime-root inputs resolve to the same Guard identity.
negative_boundaries: prior stale graduate blocks the next target
source, contract, command, environment, or coverage identity change forbids reuse
excluded private and system skills never enter the graduation queue
one representative job cannot hide an uncovered declared capability
an unregistered Guard change cannot authorize reuse
two live writers cannot both commit from the same registry state

required_revalidation: SkillGuard portfolio graduation under the final fingerprint
Autonomous UI full-route graduation under the final fingerprint
SourceGuard candidate audit after both prior targets are current
claim_boundary: The repair is incomplete until native checks, self-host, SkillGuard and Autonomous UI portfolio graduation, next-target ordering audit, and cross-platform CI are current.
